response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience in software development, cloud infrastructure, and leadership roles, with a strong background in C++ and distributed systems. However, his experience lacks direct leadership in cloud compute platforms or mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers, and his recent roles skew toward full-stack and AI infrastructure rather than large-scale infrastructure. His academic background and open-source contributions are strong, but his resume does not explicitly highlight cloud architecture or technical leadership at scale.
strengths: 10+ years of C++ experience with low-latency and high-performance systems
Proven leadership in mentoring (e.g., Refactoring Dojos, Code Kata sessions, Selenium course)
Strong background in distributed systems and microservices (Shopify, Dunnhumby)
concerns: Limited explicit experience in cloud compute platforms or DevOps leadership
Recent roles focus on full-stack and AI infrastructure rather than infrastructure/architecture
No direct experience with production-level cloud architecture balancing short- and long-term needs
